name: aitp-research-protocol
description: Codex plugin for the local AITP 1.0 v5 theoretical-physics research protocol.

interface.shortDescription: Use the local AITP 1.0 v5 research kernel from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to the repository-backed AITP 1.0 v5 MCP server and installs skills for typed theoretical-physics research workflows. Default continuation uses compact AITP context first, with explicit expansion for relation maps, process graph slices, literature/source registration, guided recording, validation gates, writing support, and trust-controlled memory.
defaultPrompt: Continue my active AITP physics topic with compact context first.
Discuss a paper and register useful references into AITP.
Draft a physics note from AITP records with citations.
